offer: For amazon sellers processing 10–50 invoices/month, missed compliance deadlines cause penalties and lost sales. We automate renewals instead of manual tracking of contracts and renewals using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in managing contract renewals and compliance with Amazon policies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for amazon sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to amazon sellers with demo video
Participate in community forums for tool sharing
try_it: Let users try Centralized contract repository and Policy compliance checklist on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
